items.title: US and Iran exchange strikes after two US soldiers killed in Jordan
items.summary: US forces target Iranian sites for the eighth night in a row, while Iran says it fired drones at the US military in Kuwait.

items.title: Tate brothers arrested in US as further UK charges take total to 59
items.summary: The Crown Prosecution Service says it has requested their extradition from the US, while their lawyer says they are innocent.

items.title: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities
items.summary: Four people are killed and at least 36 injured as Ukraine's two largest cities are targeted, as Kyiv continues its own assault on Russian infrastructure.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 防中國海洋擴張！日海保廳將研發無人船 強化釣魚台周邊警備
items.summary: 面對中國在周邊海域日益頻繁且強勢的擴張行動，日本政府為強化海上警戒與監視能力，計畫自明年度起，著手為海上保安廳研發專用的無人船。未來，日本政府規劃搭配無人船與現有的巡邏船、無...…

items.title: 中國科研船「侵門踏戶」EEZ  美巡邏艦白令海全程監控
items.summary: 美國海岸防衛隊表示，1艘巡邏艦上週在白令海（Bering Sea）監控1艘航向北極的中國科學研究船，這是今年首次有中國船隻出現在美國劃定的擴大利益範圍內。海防隊聲明指出，已觀...…

items.title: 蓋亞那渡輪載166人外海翻覆 目前53人獲救
